Scream VI (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $108,391,107Details
International Box Office $60,672,743
Worldwide Box Office $169,063,850
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,837,060
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,941,595
Total $5,778,655
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Following the latest Ghostface killings, the four survivors leave Woodsboro behind and start a fresh chapter.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$44,447,270 (41.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.44 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:64.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$33,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,675 opening theaters/3,676 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $118,497,037

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 10th, 2023 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: March 8th, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
March 8th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
March 9th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
March 9th, 2023 (Wide), released as Gritos 6 (Portugal)
March 9th, 2023 (Limited), released as Vreskot 6 (Slovakia)
Video Release: April 25th, 2023 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence and language throughout, and brief drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2772 (cert #54218), 3/1/2023)
Running Time: 123 minutes
Franchise: Scream
Filming location (country): Canada
Geographical setting: New York, New York City
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Project X Entertainment, Spyglass Media Group
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
